meaning: 叶卡特琳堡(前苏联乌拉尔地区城市斯维尔德洛夫斯克)
examples: DNA testing identifies nine bone fragments found in an unmarked grave in a Siberian forest near Ekaterinburg as those of Nicholas II — the last czar of Russia — and members of his family.
Jonathan starts this journey in an emerald mine and then makes his way down to the great city of Ekaterinburg, built to protect and exploit reserves of iron ore found in the mountains.
The Soyuz rocket, launched to carry a military communications satellite into orbit, created a spectacular light show as it passed over Ekaterinburg, the biggest city in Russia's Ural Mountains.
InterviewStreet was the ticket out of Siberia for Yakunin, the programmer from Ekaterinburg.
Weeks recalls a trip to Ekaterinburg in the Ural Mountains in October 1996 when she had lunch at a tiny restaurant inside a woman's private apartment in a nondescript building.
